metadata.title: Local On-Demand Delivery Marketplace Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, financial, operational, and safety-sensitive data assets for the local delivery marketplace domain.

assets.name: Consumer Profile
assets.description: Consumer account, address, preference, membership, contactability, and personalization profile.
assets.accessScope: consumer journeys, support, fraud, and personalization
assets.businessMeaning: Core consumer identity and preference data needed to personalize local ordering and support account recovery.

interfaces.name: consumer-profile api
interfaces.description: Access interface for consumer profile and preference data.

governance.sharingPolicy: controlled internal use with privacy review for personalization and ads

assets.name: Merchant Account
assets.description: Merchant identity, store, contract, bank, tax, commission, compliance, and activation state.
assets.accessScope: merchant onboarding, operations, settlement, and compliance
assets.businessMeaning: Source of truth for partner eligibility, commercial terms, and settlement setup.

interfaces.name: merchant-account api
interfaces.description: Access interface for merchant account and activation state.

governance.sharingPolicy: restricted to merchant, finance, compliance, and operations workflows

assets.name: Merchant Catalog
assets.description: Menus, items, SKU mappings, modifiers, photos, allergens, prices, availability, and retail assortment data.
assets.accessScope: consumer discovery, merchant operations, search, ranking, ads, and support
assets.businessMeaning: Core supply content that makes stores searchable, purchasable, and operationally accurate.

interfaces.name: merchant-catalog api
interfaces.description: Access interface for menu, item, SKU, option, price, and availability data.

governance.sharingPolicy: consumer-visible data can be published; operational data remains internal

assets.name: Order Record
assets.description: Canonical order lifecycle, state transitions, basket, merchant, courier, payment, cancellation, refund, and support references.
assets.accessScope: ordering, fulfillment, support, finance, and compliance
assets.businessMeaning: Central business object connecting marketplace demand, supply, logistics, finance, and support.

interfaces.name: order api
interfaces.description: Canonical order state and lifecycle interface.

governance.retention: financial, tax, support, and consumer protection retention window
governance.sharingPolicy: strictly controlled; redacted for analytics where possible

assets.name: Courier Profile
assets.description: Courier identity, documents, vehicle, work eligibility, market access, safety status, and payout setup.
assets.accessScope: courier onboarding, dispatch, payout, safety, and compliance
assets.businessMeaning: Source of truth for courier work access and platform eligibility.

interfaces.name: courier-profile api
interfaces.description: Access interface for courier identity and work eligibility.

governance.sharingPolicy: strictly controlled due to identity and work eligibility sensitivity

assets.name: Dispatch Assignment
assets.description: Courier offer, acceptance, assignment, reassignment, pickup, dropoff, route, and batching state.
assets.accessScope: dispatch, tracking, operations, safety, and analytics
assets.businessMeaning: Operational state needed to match orders to couriers and deliver reliably.

governance.retention: short operational retention with aggregated analytics history
governance.sharingPolicy: location data restricted to fulfillment, safety, and approved analytics

assets.name: Ledger Entry
assets.description: Immutable financial postings for consumer charges, platform fees, merchant settlement, courier payout, refunds, tax, tips, incentives, and adjustments.
assets.accessScope: finance, settlement, tax, reconciliation, and support
assets.businessMeaning: Financial source of truth for marketplace money movement.

assets.name: Marketplace Metric
assets.description: Standard GMV, orders, conversion, active users, delivery reliability, defect, courier, merchant, ads, and contribution margin metrics.
assets.accessScope: analytics, experimentation, product planning, operations, and executive reporting
assets.businessMeaning: Common metric layer for marketplace decision-making.

interfaces.name: marketplace metrics api
interfaces.description: Metric definitions and governed reporting interface.

governance.retention: analytics retention window with privacy aggregation
governance.sharingPolicy: approved business intelligence, experimentation, and ML usage

assets.name: Basket State
assets.description: Active basket, modifiers, substitutions, fees, offers, and checkout preparation state.
assets.accessScope: consumer ordering and checkout
assets.businessMeaning: Temporary intent state that drives checkout conversion and substitution handling.

governance.retention: short active-session retention plus anonymized analytics

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Payment authorization, capture, refund, tip, credit, and adjustment transaction state.
assets.accessScope: checkout, support, risk, and finance
assets.businessMeaning: Payment state that connects consumer checkout to ledger posting.

assets.name: Order History
assets.description: Historical order, session, store, item, reorder, and retention data used for personalization and analytics.
assets.accessScope: personalization, analytics, and experimentation
assets.businessMeaning: History used to drive repeat ordering, recommendations, and retention analysis.

interfaces.name: order-history features api
interfaces.description: Feature access for personalization and recommendations.

assets.name: Membership Record
assets.description: Subscription, trial, renewal, benefit eligibility, savings, and cancellation state.
assets.accessScope: membership, checkout, pricing, and support
assets.businessMeaning: Determines consumer subscription benefits and retention state.

assets.name: Quality Signal
assets.description: Ratings, reviews, refunds, cancellations, lateness, substitutions, and defect feedback.
assets.accessScope: ranking, quality, support, and marketplace operations
assets.businessMeaning: Quality feedback used to rank supply and reduce defects.

interfaces.name: quality signal api
interfaces.description: Ratings and defect signal access interface.

assets.name: Support Case
assets.description: Customer, merchant, courier, and agent support issues, resolutions, refunds, credits, and escalations.
assets.accessScope: support, issue recovery, risk, and operations
assets.businessMeaning: Record of issue recovery and operational defects.

interfaces.name: support case api
interfaces.description: Support issue and resolution access interface.

governance.retention: support and consumer protection retention window

assets.name: Delivery Event
assets.description: Pickup, dropoff, route, courier location, ETA, delay, and handoff events.
assets.accessScope: dispatch, tracking, safety, and analytics
assets.businessMeaning: Operational event stream used for tracking, ETA, and delivery quality.

governance.retention: short location retention with aggregated history

assets.name: Merchant Operation Event
assets.description: Merchant order accept, reject, delay, busy-mode, prep, substitution, and handoff events.
assets.accessScope: merchant operations, dispatch, support, and analytics
assets.businessMeaning: Operational signal needed to align courier dispatch with store readiness.

interfaces.name: merchant operation events stream
interfaces.description: Merchant prep and operation event stream.

assets.name: Pricing Rule
assets.description: Delivery fee, service fee, promotion, discount, membership, tax, and affordability rules.
assets.accessScope: pricing, checkout, promotions, and finance
assets.businessMeaning: Business rules that determine basket economics and marketplace take rate.

interfaces.name: pricing rules api
interfaces.description: Pricing and promotion rule access interface.

assets.name: Promotion Campaign
assets.description: Merchant-funded and platform-funded campaign, budget, audience, offer, eligibility, and redemption data.
assets.accessScope: promotions, checkout, reporting, and analytics
assets.businessMeaning: Campaign state used to grow demand and measure promotional economics.

assets.name: Ads Campaign
assets.description: Sponsored listing, retail media, auction, budget, impression, click, spend, and attribution data.
assets.accessScope: ads serving, measurement, billing, and reporting
assets.businessMeaning: Advertising product data used for monetization and merchant growth.

interfaces.name: ads campaign api
interfaces.description: Ads campaign, auction, and reporting interface.

governance.sharingPolicy: ads measurement and merchant reporting use

assets.name: Merchant Performance Metric
assets.description: Merchant sales, conversion, defects, prep, ads, promotion, payout, and retention metrics.
assets.accessScope: merchant reporting and operations
assets.businessMeaning: Reporting layer for merchant performance improvement and growth decisions.

assets.name: Retail Inventory Snapshot
assets.description: Near-real-time retail SKU stock, substitution, weighted-item, and picker availability state.
assets.accessScope: retail catalog, basket, substitution, and fulfillment
assets.businessMeaning: Inventory freshness needed for grocery and retail delivery reliability.

governance.sharingPolicy: retail fulfillment and consumer ordering use

assets.name: Courier Availability
assets.description: Courier online status, zone, shift, incentive eligibility, work preferences, and supply forecast state.
assets.accessScope: dispatch, incentives, and supply planning
assets.businessMeaning: Real-time and planned supply state for marketplace balance.

interfaces.name: courier availability api
interfaces.description: Courier online and incentive state interface.

governance.retention: short location retention with aggregated history

assets.name: Courier Earnings Record
assets.description: Courier base pay, distance pay, time pay, tips, boosts, quests, adjustments, cashout, and tax references.
assets.accessScope: courier earnings, payout, finance, support, and compliance
assets.businessMeaning: Courier-facing and finance-facing source of earnings truth.

governance.sharingPolicy: courier, finance, support, and compliance use

assets.name: Geospatial Event
assets.description: Address, zone, route, travel time, ETA, geocode, weather, traffic, and location-derived events.
assets.accessScope: routing, dispatch, tracking, and operations
assets.businessMeaning: Geospatial data used to calculate delivery promises and routes.

governance.retention: short location retention with aggregated history

assets.name: Safety Incident
assets.description: Courier, consumer, merchant, delivery proof, unsafe location, emergency, and incident escalation records.
assets.accessScope: safety, support, trust, and legal escalation
assets.businessMeaning: Record of safety events and platform response.

governance.sharingPolicy: strictly controlled safety and legal use

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, authentication factors, device trust, account recovery, and access policy state.
assets.accessScope: identity, authentication, authorization, and account recovery
assets.businessMeaning: Controls secure access across marketplace actors.

assets.name: Risk Signal
assets.description: Fraud, abuse, device, payment, refund, promotion, account, and policy decision signals.
assets.accessScope: risk decisioning, policy enforcement, and support
assets.businessMeaning: Trust and abuse signal layer used to protect the marketplace.

governance.sharingPolicy: strict trust and risk use only

assets.name: Experiment Assignment
assets.description: Experiment assignment, exposure, holdout, metric, guardrail, and readout data.
assets.accessScope: experimentation and product measurement
assets.businessMeaning: Controlled testing data used to make product decisions.

assets.name: API Usage Log
assets.description: Partner API calls, webhooks, authentication, rate-limit, schema, error, and integration-health records.
assets.accessScope: partner APIs, developer support, security, and operations
assets.businessMeaning: Operational and security record for external partner integrations.

interfaces.name: api usage log api
interfaces.description: Partner integration usage and health interface.

assets.name: Operations Incident
assets.description: Marketplace incident, manual intervention, city operations, playbook, outage, and regulatory reporting records.
assets.accessScope: operations, support, incident response, and compliance
assets.businessMeaning: Operational control record for market health and incident response.
